turns.assistantContent: The YAML frontmatter in `use-hivemind-git-memory/SKILL.md` has an unquoted description containing `Use when:` which the YAML parser interprets as a nested mapping. I need to fix this SKILL.md file — the colon after "when" is causing the parse error.
